reviews.review_description: The first thing I wanted to start with was the immediate observation that a lot of assets are ripped from other games, the most notable being Drunken Bar Fight and Nightclub Simulator. I understand using assets from other people because you’re an Indie dev but no where do I see you credit them. The maps are ok, not bad for what’s being done. The AI is atrocious, their path finding is literally knowing where you were when they have guns, and the melee is just them waiting to attack you in an area. The “cutting edge” physics aren’t that cutting edge and could use some work. I definitely don’t think this all should be perfect but don’t advertise it like it is.

💬 TLDR: "Go buy Dead Second or Crisis Brigade 2 Reloaded, two full-fledged arcade gun games with significantly better handling mechanics for roughly the same asking price." ——— ❌ All guns have no chambering / cocking action. ❌ Shooting and reloading doesn't have any weight or punch to them. ❌ While trying to grip the front of subs and rifles, you will often end up grabbing and ejecting the magazine by accident. ❌ Enemies just charge blindly at you.
This game is so much fun;so worth it’ but can we add a Ar-15 please
Very good more guns and maps pls when full release?
A very good game to play!
